finding.summary: No clear problem detected on this isolated capture. Headroom, dynamics, and tonal balance all sit within normal ranges for an unprocessed synth.
finding.probable_cause: True peak is -5.5 dBFS with healthy 12 dB crest factor and 8 LU LRA, indicating neither limiting nor over-compression. Spectrum declines smoothly from 100 Hz (-18 dB) to 4 kHz (-30 dB), a typical synth tilt. The FX chain is empty and there are no sends or parent routing, so there is nothing misconfigured in the payload to act on.
finding.confidence_reason: Core dynamics and level metrics are present and within expected ranges, but with an empty FX chain and no processing context the evidence cannot justify any move beyond observation.

evidence_refs.description: -5.5 dBFS leaves comfortable headroom; no clipping risk.
12 dB crest factor indicates healthy, non-squashed dynamics.
8 LU LRA is moderate and consistent with natural performance dynamics.
-20 dBFS RMS pairs with -5.5 dBTP to give a 14.5 dB peak-to-average ratio.
0.05 silence fraction confirms the capture is essentially live content, so level stats are not diluted.
Smooth ~6 dB/oct decline from 100 Hz to 4 kHz; no obvious resonant or deficient band.
Empty FX chain; no in-track processing to evaluate.
true: capture is isolated to this track, supporting per-track conclusions.

proposal.reason: No clear problem is present and no safe move is supported by this capture. Levels, dynamics, and tonal balance are all within normal ranges; the empty FX chain and absent sends/parent routing leave no in-payload misconfiguration to correct.
